title: TRANSITIONAL HOUSING - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET TRANSITIONAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing and help with finding apartments, getting vouchers and subsidies, and connecting to other services. Housing options include The Moxie, a 24-bed facility in downtown Portland; Unity House, for LGBTQ2+; New Doors, for youth transitioning from foster care; New Meadows, a 15-unit community for youth formerly in foster care; and Butterfly House, for youth involved in the sex trade. 1220 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Varies by program; age 25 and under experiencing homelessness or housing instability, with a focus on former foster youth, individuals with disabilities, and LGBTQIA2S+ youth Hours: Not applicable Email (503) 517-3912 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 224-4339 Main phone Main phone (503) 517-3912 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the lower level of the building. Use the side door next to the parking lot and press the buzzer to enter. Services: Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Youth Transitional Housing/Shelter * Homeless Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - AVENUES TO COLLEGE COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET
